task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: The implementation successfully creates the required static function with proper template auto-detection (checking for [INST]/[/INST] absence of [SYSTEM_PROMPT]), includes the LOG_DBG call, and properly dispatches the handler with (tmpl, params). However, there is a critical requirement violation: the format is set to COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of the required COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY. The implementation also delegates actual wrapping logic to the template via common_chat_template_direct_apply_impl rather than explicitly implementing the [INST]/[/INST] wrapping in the handler itself, which may be acceptable depending on template design but differs from typical explicit handler implementations. All other requirements are met: preserved tokens are correctly set, comments document the format, no existing handlers are modified, and the detection logic properly distinguishes from Ministral 3 by checking for [SYSTEM_PROMPT] absence.
